schema: UOS universal graph package — Consumer core, re-seeded with full Wave A+B core pack set

Institution.name: California Credit Union

charter.charter_renumber_note: renumbered 60784 -> 24980 effective Q4 2025; 60784 holds pre-Q4-2025 5300 history

Institution.field_of_membership: employee/retiree/volunteer of a Partner Organization + immediate family/household; open path via American Consumer Council
Institution.asset_size: NEEDS_FI/5300 — pull from NCUA 5300 (charter 60784 history + 24980 current)
Institution.brand_voice: NEEDS_FI — brand guidelines (CMP-5) not public in usable form

customer_account_note: 0 instances by design — member data is on the never-asked list (KG Master section 8). Customer/Account populate at runtime from CCU systems (SYS-1/2); evals use synthetic customers only.
